specs.title: Hunting: Credential Attack Correlation (PowerShell + Mimikatz + Kerberoast)
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and (('Event ID' = '4688' and ('Original Log Content' like '%powershell%' and ('Original Log Content' like '%DownloadString%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%-enc %' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Invoke-Mimikatz%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Invoke-Kerberoast%'))) or ('Event ID' = '4688' and ('Original Log Content' like '%sekurlsa::%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%lsadump::%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%mimikatz%')) or ('Event ID' = '4769' and 'Original Log Content' like '%0x17%')) | eval AttackStage = if('Event ID' = '4769', 'Kerberoasting', 'Endpoint_Credential_Tooling') | stats count as TotalEvents, distinctcount(AttackStage) as AttackStages, distinctcount('Event ID') as EventVectors by Entity | where AttackStages >= 2 | sort -TotalEvents

specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs') | timestats span = 6hour count as Events by 'Log Source'

specs.title: Cloud: Critical OCI Audit Events (l21d)
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('Event Type' like '*delete*' or 'Event Type' like '*terminate*' or 'Event Type' like '*remove*' or 'Event Type' like '*DeletePolicy*' or 'Event Type' like '*DeleteCompartment*') | stats count as CloudThreats

specs.title: Top Attacker Source IPs - OCI Audit (l21d)
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and 'Source IP' != null and ('Event Type' like '*delete*' or 'Event Type' like '*terminate*' or 'Event Type' like '*remove*' or 'Event Type' like '*update*' or 'Event Type' like '*create*' or 'Event Type' like '*DeletePolicy*' or 'Event Type' like '*DeleteCompartment*') | stats count as DestructiveEvents, distinctcount('Event Type') as DistinctActions, distinctcount('User Name') as Users by 'Source IP' | sort -DestructiveEvents

specs.title: DNS Exfiltration Detection (Entropy Analysis)
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events') and 'Query Name' != '' | eval domain_length = length('Query Name') | where domain_length > 14 | stats count as long_dns_queries, unique('Query Name') as unique_domains by 'Host Name (Server)' | sort -long_dns_queries | where long_dns_queries > 3

specs.title: 2025-2026: Exfiltration After Initial Access
specs.query: ('Trace ID' = 'trace_clickfix_2026_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_aitm_token_2026_001' or 'Threat Name' = 'ClickFix Data Exfiltration' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration' or 'Resource Name' like '*payroll-may-2026.csv*' or 'Resource Name' like '*customer-export-2026-05.csv*') and ('Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs') | stats count as Evidence, unique('Bytes Sent') as BytesSent, unique('Resource Name') as Resources, unique('Threat Name') as Threats by 'Log Source', 'Destination IP', 'User Name', 'Trace ID' | sort -Evidence
reasons: scheduled-search rules support at most 3 dimensions

specs.title: FLF: BITS Exfiltration Hunt
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs') and ('Process Name' like '*\\bitsadmin.exe' or 'Command Line' like '*Start-BitsTransfer*' or 'Command Line' like '*bitsadmin*') and ('Command Line' like '*http*' or 'Destination IP' != null or 'Destination Hostname' != null) | stats count as Events, unique('Command Line') as Commands, unique('Destination IP') as Destinations, unique('Destination Hostname') as Hostnames by 'Host Name (Server)', 'Process Name' | sort -Events

specs.title: FLF: Cloud Service Exfiltration Hunt
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and 'Event ID' = '3' and ('Destination Hostname' like '*graph.microsoft.com*' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*login.microsoftonline.com*' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*drive.google.com*' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*dropbox.com*' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*slack.com*' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*onedrive*') and not (('Process Name' like '*\\OneDrive.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\Teams.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\OUTLOOK.EXE' or 'Process Name' like '*\\msedge.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\chrome.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\firefox.exe')) | stats count as CloudApiEvents, unique('Destination Hostname') as CloudHosts by 'Host Name (Server)', 'Process Name', 'Destination IP' | sort -CloudApiEvents

specs.title: FLF: Credential Stuffing Pattern
specs.query: ((('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and ('Event ID' = '4625' or 'Event ID' = '4624')) or ('Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ('Attack Type' in ('broken_auth', 'rate_limit_bypass', 'brute_force') or msg like '*login failed*' or msg like '*auth failure*'))) | stats count as LoginEvents, distinctcount(User) as Accounts, unique('Event ID') as WindowsOutcomes, unique('Response Code') as HttpOutcomes by 'Source IP', 'Client IP' | where LoginEvents > 5 | sort -LoginEvents

specs.title: FLF: DNS C2 Pattern Analysis
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and 'Event ID' = '22' and 'Query Name' != null and ('Query Name' like '*.dnsexfil.example' or 'Query Name' like '*.duckdns.org' or 'Query Name' like '*.xyz' or 'Query Name' like '*.top' or 'Query Name' like '*.info' or 'Query Name' like '*.cc' or 'Query Name' like '*.pw' or 'Query Name' like '*.tk') | stats count as DNSQueries, distinctcount('Query Name') as UniqueQueries, unique('Query Name') as QueryNames by 'Host Name (Server)' | where DNSQueries > 2 | sort -DNSQueries

specs.title: FLF: Domain Fronting CDN C2 Hunt
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and 'Event ID' = '3' and 'Destination Port' = 443 and ('Destination Hostname' like '*cloudfront.net' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*azureedge.net' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*cloudflare*' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*workers.dev' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*graph.microsoft.com') and not (('Process Name' like '*\\chrome.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\msedge.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\firefox.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\iexplore.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\OneDrive.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\Teams.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\OUTLOOK.EXE')) | stats count as FrontingCandidates, unique('Destination Hostname') as CDNHosts by 'Host Name (Server)', 'Process Name', 'Destination IP' | sort -FrontingCandidates

specs.title: FLF: New User Persistence
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '4720' | stats count as NewUsers by 'Host Name (Server)', User, 'Source IP' | sort -NewUsers

specs.title: FLF: Port Knocking Sequence Drilldown

specs.title: FLF: vsagent HTTP Beaconing

specs.title: Hunting: GOAD/Apex Caldera Attack Chain (Multi-Stage)

specs.title: Hunting: GOAD/Apex Caldera Sandcat Agent Activity

specs.title: Hunting: Kerberoasting Anomaly - RC4 vs AES Encryption Ratio

specs.title: Linux Data Staging and Exfiltration Indicators
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (msg like '*tar *' or msg like '*zip *' or msg like '*gzip *' or msg like '*curl *' or msg like '*wget *' or msg like '*scp *' or msg like '*nc *') | stats count as staging_commands, distinctcount('Process Name') as tools_used by 'Host Name' | sort -staging_commands | where staging_commands > 4 and tools_used > 2

specs.title: Linux Multi-Stage Attack Indicators (Combined Methods)
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' and (msg like '*Failed password*' or msg like '*authorized_keys*' or msg like '*/dev/tcp/*' or msg like '*curl*http*' or msg like '*wget*http*' or msg like '*crontab*' or msg like '*systemctl enable*' or msg like '*/etc/passwd*' or msg like '*/etc/shadow*') | stats count as total_indicators, distinctcount(msg) as unique_patterns by 'Host Name' | where unique_patterns > 3 | sort -total_indicators

specs.title: Linux Persistence Indicator Score (Combined Methods)

specs.title: Linux Rare Process Detection (Stacking)

specs.title: Hunting: Logon Anomaly - Account Activity Profiling
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' in ('4624', '4625', '4648', '4672') and not 'Target User Name' = 'ANONYMOUS LOGON' and not 'Target User Name' like '%$' | eval IsFailure = if('Event ID' = '4625', 1, 0) | eval IsExplicit = if('Event ID' = '4648', 1, 0) | eval IsPrivilege = if('Event ID' = '4672', 1, 0) | stats count as TotalEvents, sum(IsFailure) as Failures, sum(IsExplicit) as ExplicitCreds, sum(IsPrivilege) as PrivilegeAssigns, distinctcount(Entity) as UniqueHosts by 'Target User Name' | eval FailRate = round(Failures * 100 / TotalEvents, 1) | where UniqueHosts > 2 or ExplicitCreds > 10 or FailRate > 20 | sort -UniqueHosts

specs.title: OCI After-Hours IAM Activity (Time-Based Anomaly)

specs.title: OCI IAM and Fusion Activity Correlation

reasons: query depends on unavailable Fusion Apps demo sources

specs.title: OCI IAM Rapid Configuration Changes (Anomaly Detection)

specs.title: OCI Multiple Users from Same IP (Grouping)

specs.title: OCI Privilege Escalation Chain Detection

specs.title: SharePoint ToolShell: Webshell Post-Exploit

specs.title: Web Scanner Tool Identification (User Agent Stacking)
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') | stats count as requests, distinctcount('Client IP') as source_ips, distinctcount('Response Code') as status_codes by 'User Agent' | sort -requests | where requests > 50 and source_ips < 5

specs.title: Web-to-Cloud: Attack Path Link Analysis
specs.query: ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Client IP' = '203.0.113.50' or 'Source IP' = '10.0.1.50' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'User Name' = 'compromised-svc@corp.example.com' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration') | link span = 15minute 'Trace ID', 'Log Source' | eventstats max(Count) as PeakEvents, sum(Count) as Events, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, distinctcount('Log Source') as Sources
reasons: dashboard-only visualization type: link
query does not expose an explicit aggregate metric alias

specs.title: Web-to-Cloud: Correlated Attack Timeline
specs.query: ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Client IP' = '203.0.113.50' or 'Source IP' = '10.0.1.50' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'User Name' = 'compromised-svc@corp.example.com' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration') | stats count as Events, unique('Request URL') as Requests, unique('Destination IP') as Destinations by 'Log Source', 'Trace ID' | sort -Events

specs.title: Web-to-Cloud: OCI Audit Cloud Abuse
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'User Name' = 'compromised-svc@corp.example.com' or 'Resource Name' like '*prod-customer-backups*') | stats count as AuditEvents, unique('Event Type') as EventTypes, unique('Resource Name') as Resources by 'User Name', 'Source IP', Status | sort -AuditEvents

specs.title: Web-to-Cloud: Compromised Cloud Identity
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('User Name' = 'compromised-svc@corp.example.com' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001') | stats count as CloudActions, distinctcount('Event Type') as UniqueActions, unique('Event Type') as EventTypes, unique('Resource Name') as Resources by 'User Name', 'Source IP', 'Trace ID' | sort -CloudActions

specs.title: Web-to-Cloud: Compromised Machines
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs') and ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Host Name' = 'app-prod-02' or 'Host Name (Server)' = 'SRV01.sevenkingdoms.local' or 'Source IP' = '10.0.1.50' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77') | stats count as Events, unique('Process Name') as Processes, unique('Destination IP') as Destinations by 'Log Source', 'Host Name', 'Host Name (Server)', 'Source IP' | sort -Events
reasons: scheduled-search rules support at most 3 dimensions

specs.title: Web-to-Cloud: Entry Point and SSRF Evidence
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs') and ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Client IP' = '203.0.113.50' or 'Request URL' like '*169.254.169.254*') | stats count as Events, unique('Action') as Actions, unique('Response Code') as ResponseCodes, unique('Request URL') as Requests by 'Client IP', 'Trace ID', 'Log Source', 'Host Name' | sort -Events
reasons: scheduled-search rules support at most 3 dimensions

specs.title: Web-to-Cloud: Exfiltrated Data Evidence
specs.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs') and ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration' or 'Resource Name' like '*customer-export-2026-05.csv*') | stats count as Evidence, unique('Bytes Sent') as BytesSent, unique('Resource Name') as Resources, unique('Threat Name') as Threats by 'Log Source', 'Destination IP', 'User Name', 'Trace ID' | sort -Evidence
reasons: scheduled-search rules support at most 3 dimensions

specs.title: Web-to-Cloud: Network Firewall C2 and Threat Alerts
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs' and ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'Threat Name' != null) | stats count as Events, unique('Threat Name') as Threats, unique('Firewall Rule') as Rules, unique('Bytes Sent') as BytesSent by 'Source IP', 'Destination IP', 'Action', 'Log Type' | sort -Events
reasons: scheduled-search rules support at most 3 dimensions

specs.title: Web-to-Cloud: MITRE Stage Breakdown
specs.query: ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Client IP' = '203.0.113.50' or 'Source IP' = '10.0.1.50' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'User Name' = 'compromised-svc@corp.example.com' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration') | stats count as Events by 'Log Source', 'Threat Name' | sort -Events

specs.title: Web-to-Cloud: VCN Egress and Exfil Flows
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' and ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Source IP' = '10.0.1.50' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77') | stats count as Flows, unique('Action') as Actions, unique('Bytes Sent') as BytesSent, unique('Flow ID') as FlowIds by 'Source IP', 'Destination IP', 'Destination Port', 'Trace ID' | sort -Flows
reasons: scheduled-search rules support at most 3 dimensions

specs.title: Windows Credential Access Tool Cluster (Grouping)
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' and (('Command Line' like '*sekurlsa*') or ('Command Line' like '*lsass*') or ('Command Line' like '*mimikatz*') or ('Command Line' like '*procdump*lsass*') or ('Command Line' like '*comsvcs*MiniDump*') or ('Command Line' like '*kerberoast*') or ('Command Line' like '*ntds*') or ('Command Line' like '*WDigest*')) | stats count as cred_events, distinctcount('Command Line') as unique_techniques by 'Host Name', User | sort -cred_events

specs.title: Windows Defense Evasion Score (Combined Methods)
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' and (('Command Line' like '*wevtutil*cl*') or ('Command Line' like '*Clear-EventLog*') or ('Command Line' like '*AmsiUtils*') or ('Command Line' like '*amsiInitFailed*') or ('Command Line' like '*netsh*firewall*') or ('Command Line' like '*advfirewall*set*off*') or ('Command Line' like '*fodhelper*') or ('Command Line' like '*eventvwr*') or ('Command Line' like '*NtUnmapViewOfSection*') or ('Command Line' like '*CREATE_SUSPENDED*')) | stats count as evasion_events, distinctcount('Command Line') as unique_techniques by 'Host Name' | where unique_techniques > 1 | sort -unique_techniques

specs.title: Windows Lateral Movement Tool Cluster (Grouping)
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' and (('Process Name' like '*psexec*') or ('Process Name' like '*mstsc*') or ('Command Line' like '*Enter-PSSession*') or ('Command Line' like '*Invoke-Command*') or ('Command Line' like '*wmic*node*')) | stats count as lateral_events, distinctcount('Process Name') as unique_tools by 'Host Name' | where unique_tools > 1 | sort -lateral_events

specs.title: Windows Suspiciously Long Command Line (Field Analysis)
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' | eval cmd_len = length('Command Line') | where cmd_len > 500 | sort -cmd_len | fields 'Process Name', 'Command Line', cmd_len, 'Host Name', User
reasons: query does not expose an explicit aggregate metric alias

specs.title: Windows Process from Unusual Path (Rare Value Analysis)
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' and (('Process Name' like '*Temp*') or ('Process Name' like '*Users*Public*') or ('Process Name' like '*AppData*Local*Temp*') or ('Process Name' like '*Downloads*') or ('Process Name' like '*ProgramData*')) | stats count as executions by 'Process Name', 'Host Name' | sort -executions

specs.title: Windows Rare Process Detection (Stacking)
specs.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' and 'Process Name' != '' | stats count as executions by 'Process Name' | sort executions | head 25
